title: How LLMs Actually Work
summary: Under the hood, a large language model does exactly one thing: predict the next word-piece. Learn how that single trick, repeated fast enough, produces essays, answers, and code.

context.headline: One trick, repeated a thousand times
context.description: Every chatbot answer is built the same way: your prompt goes in, the model predicts the most likely next token, adds it to the text, and repeats. Understanding this loop - and the handful of terms around it - demystifies almost everything about modern AI.
context.when: The engine behind every modern chatbot
